market_size.sam: $28.5B — Application Security Testing + DevSecOps + CTEM (2026 est.)
market_size.som: $2.5B — Mid-market and enterprise CTEM/Decision Intelligence platforms (initial addressable)

market_growth.cybersecurity_vc_2025: $13.97B across 392 VC rounds (47% YoY) + $18-21B total incl. growth equity across 820 deals
market_growth.ma_jan_2026: 34-38 deals — 3rd highest monthly count ever, ~477 projected annually
market_growth.ma_2026_trend: Sovereign M&A — US vendors acquiring EU firms for NIS2/CRA compliance. Consolidation in identity, cloud posture, automated risk.
market_growth.gartner_ctem_prediction: Organizations with CTEM programs are 3x less likely to suffer a breach by 2026 (Gartner)
market_growth.agentic_ai_adoption: 67% of orgs using agentic AI. 48% believe agentic AI = top attack vector by EOY 2026. Only 29% prepared to secure agentic AI.
market_growth.mcp_adoption_forecast: 30% of enterprise app vendors will launch MCP servers in 2026 (Forrester)
market_growth.mcp_security_crisis: 30 CVEs in MCP ecosystem in ~15 months. 36.7% of 7,000+ MCP servers vulnerable to SSRF.
market_growth.webmcp_chrome: Browser-native MCP in Chrome early preview (Mar 2026)
market_growth.cisa_kev_entries: 1,529 as of v2026.02.26. 2026 pace: 45 entries in Jan-Feb (~270/year)
market_growth.vllm_status: v0.16.0 — mature production ecosystem. Best hardware flexibility (AMD + NVIDIA).
market_growth.sglang_status: v0.5.8. 400K+ GPU deployments. De facto standard. 16,200 TPS on H100. RadixAttention: 5x faster for agent workflows.
market_growth.claude_code_security: Feb 20, 2026 — 500+ zero-days found, cyber stocks dropped, industry disruption
market_growth.anthropic_pentagon_crisis: Feb 27: Blacklisted as supply chain risk. Feb 28: Anthropic filing legal challenge. Mar 1-2: Claude #1 App Store. Signups all-time records.
market_growth.openai_pentagon_deal: Feb 27, 2026 — OpenAI struck Pentagon deal within hours of Anthropic blacklist
market_growth.n8n_critical_rce: CVE-2026-21858 — CVSS 10.0. ~100K servers affected. AI workflow platform RCE. Validates AI toolchain attack surface.
market_growth.claude_weaponized_mexico: 1,000+ Claude Code prompts + GPT-4.1 used to breach 10 Mexican govt agencies + 1 financial institution (Dec 2025-Mar 2026). AI-powered attacks are REAL.
market_growth.chinese_labs_anthropic_abuse: DeepSeek, Moonshot AI, MiniMax: 24,000+ fraudulent accounts, 16M+ interactions on Anthropic platform.
market_growth.mcp_tenable_stat: 70% of orgs have AI/MCP third-party packages. 86% host packages with critical vulnerabilities (Tenable 2026).
market_growth.epss_over_50pct: 7,079 CVEs with >50% exploitation probability. Top 2026 CVE: CVE-2026-24061 (78% EPSS).
market_growth.shadow_ai_risk: 47% using GenAI via personal accounts (Netskope). Data violations doubled YoY. 92% of security pros concerned.
market_growth.nist_agentic_ai: CAISI RFI on AI agent security — deadline March 9, 2026. NCCoE draft on agent identity/authorization.
market_growth.cybersecurity_llm_development: Trend Micro (Llama 3 cybersec model, open weights), Cisco+Google+Meta collaboration
market_growth.rsa_2026: March 23-26, Moscone Center SF. Theme: Power of Community. PQC focus.
market_growth.crowdstrike_q4_earnings: March 3, 2026. Startup Accelerator pitch day March 24 at RSA. FalconID GA.
market_growth.wiz_google_closing: End of March 2026. All major regulatory approvals secured. CISPE alarmed.

competitors.name: Snyk

competitors.aldeci_advantage: Full CTEM lifecycle vs. SCA+SAST only. Multi-LLM consensus vs. single model. 97% noise reduction across ALL scanners.
competitors.latest_update: 2026-03-02 Pass 5: Valuation $8.5B corrected. ARR $343M. IPO dimming per BankInfoSecurity. Package Health Check for agentic dev.

competitors.name: Wiz
competitors.status: Google acquisition closing MID-MARCH 2026. 3 minor jurisdictions remaining (AU/ZA/TR). Staff payout $2-2.5B. $3M closing party. CISPE alarmed.
competitors.aldeci_advantage: Scanner-neutral Switzerland vs. Google lock-in. AppSec vs cloud-only. Air-gapped. PEAK Switzerland moment NOW.
competitors.latest_update: 2026-03-02 Pass 5: Mid-March closing. Staff $2-2.5B payout. $3M party. CISPE publicly alarmed.
